reasoning: The SOC2 control CC6.2 focuses on the registration and authorization of users before granting system access. In Kubernetes, this maps to RBAC controls where user access is managed through Roles, ClusterRoles, RoleBindings, and ClusterRoleBindings. Ensuring that users and service accounts are properly registered and authorized aligns with the control's requirements. Additionally, reviewing access permissions and ensuring that service accounts are managed correctly are crucial for maintaining secure access control.
title: CC6.2 Prior to issuing system credentials and granting system access, the entity registers and authorizes new internal and external users whose access is administered by the entity
